message:
fix: prevent UTF-8 boundary panics in extract_delta sliding window

Two unsafe byte-offset slicing operations could slice mid-codepoint
when the overlap window started inside a multi-byte UTF-8 sequence:

- Snap search_start forward to valid char boundary before slicing
- Skip memchr byte positions that don't fall on char boundaries

Adds 4 new tests covering Cyrillic, box-drawing, emoji, and small
overlap scenarios that previously triggered panics.

Closes #21

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
